title: The Island Sees the Truth
description: On pages 16–16, this part focuses on Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is the island sees the truth.
scene: The scene follows the island sees the truth, keeping the focus on Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have business on the deck? Then I'll wait for you there!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ahhh... why, if it isn't hody Jones!! Bahoho hoh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How did things go with Neptune?! Is He Dead?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm just taking care of Shirahoshii now with this ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't you think it's a wonderful idea?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What will happen to this ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...with you dead and gone? Well, decken?

summary: The Island Sees the Truth. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
